title: Sculk Blockset
description: Adds Sculk wall, stairs, slab and fences.
body:
It adds 5 sculk blocks: stairs, slab, wall, fence and fence gate.

The blocks behave in a similar way as sculk, their primary tool is hoe, they drop XP if broken without silk touch, they drop themselves with silk touch.

The texture is animated in the same way as the sculk block is. And the sound is also the same.

This mod also adds the recipes and they are as you would expect in vanilla minecraft.
